description_long: This dam structure is constructed primarily from light-colored wood panels, featuring a broad, curved central section reminiscent of a skate ramp, flanked by vertical walls. The top edges are lined with metal railings for safety, and one end includes a stairway leading to an elevated platform. The dam has a large rectangular opening at its base, possibly for water passage or maintenance access, and the exterior is adorned with various decals and graffiti, adding an urban aesthetic. The overall design is compact and modular, with clean lines and a smooth finish. The structure is elevated on short legs, allowing for clearance beneath the main body.
description: A light wood dam structure with curved central section, metal railings, stairway, and urban decals. Features a large base opening and smooth, clean surfaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the stairway, elevated platform, and large rectangular opening at the base.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the curved central section, metal railings, and open interior space.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying graffiti, the rectangular opening, and the full length of the dam.
description_view_3: End view from the opposite side, showing the curved section, platform, and various decals.
